perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with two women in close-up talking excitedly to the camera in what appears to be an elevator or small room. (2) Scene transitions to a bridal boutique lobby where the store name 'Grace Kelly' is visible; one woman gestures towards a mannequin wearing a gown. (3) A sequence follows where a curtain is pulled back multiple times to reveal a woman trying on different wedding dresses: first a sparkling white V-neck gown, then a form-fitting mermaid gown with a low back, followed by a short champagne-colored puffy dress, and finally a short off-the-shoulder white dress with a train. (4) Interspersed are shots of the vlogger reacting to the dresses and a brief clip of an animated bald monk character. (5) The video ends with a montage of the gowns and the woman posing in front of a mirror.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo pop music starts immediately and continues throughout the video. (2) Two female voices speak in high-pitched, excited tones, talking about going to try on wedding dresses and getting married. (3) Occasional sound effects are heard, including a camera shutter sound during poses, a 'ding' sound for emphasis, and a 'woah' vocal effect. (4) The audio concludes with the music fading as one woman asks for the audience's opinion.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '今天我要帶你來試婚紗' (Today I want to take you to try on wedding dresses) - Functional introduction. (2) '我要結婚啦' (I'm getting married!) - Emotional hook. (3) '選手 1', '選手 2', '選手 3', '選手 4' (Contestant 1, 2, 3, 4) - Functional labels for the dresses. (4) '真香' (So nice/Beautiful) - Decorative/Slang hook. (5) '大家喜歡哪一套呢？' (Which set does everyone like?) - Functional call to action.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro announcement -> Reveal of multiple outfits -> Call for viewer feedback

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main creators (vlogger and bride-to-be) and at least 2 shop assistants visible in the mirror backgrounds.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman with long dark hair in a casual blue robe (vlogger), and another woman with light brown hair trying on various white and champagne wedding gowns.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A luxury bridal shop featuring large mirrors, clothing racks with white gowns, plush couches, silver curtains, and elegant chandeliers.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright studio lighting, very even and high-key.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Series of reveals -> Interactive Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To share a lifestyle milestone (wedding preparation) while showcasing a variety of bridal gowns at a specific boutique to engage and entertain the audience.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of the store name 'Grace Kelly' and a focused experience of their services and products.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy feminine banter, use of variety-show style text overlays.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video follows a standard 'outfit try-on' format popularized by fashion influencers, focusing on the visual appeal of the dresses and the chemistry between the presenters.
